data.name: Strip Black Jack - At The Pub
data.detailed_description:
It's Friday night and you want to end the evening in your favorite pub when you meet the woman of your dreams. Soon it shows that she's not as shy and innocent as she looks because she invites you to a game of Strip Blackjack.
"Very soon your clothes will lie on the floor and I on top of you", you think...
Can you defeat the pretty lady and want to experience an erotic adventure? - Then you've come to the right place!
If you want to make it easy for yourself, choose the "Easy Mode" or take the hard way to really give it to her!

By the way: In this game you can have sex with both ladies this time!

## NEW ##
Now with very Easy Mode for the impatient among you :)
Get even more money with each won round!
Now get more money from the lucky wheel!


Info:
This is a blackjack game that is only suitable for adults as sexual content is shown
This game contains:
  • Completely naked persons and their genitals.
  • People who satisfy themselves.
  • People during sexual intercourse

Features:

  • 9 striptease levels, each with different poses!
  • Change the view of the camera or zoom in any time you want!
  • Interactive videos!
  • Awesome graphic!
  • Lots of achievements!
  • Save in the Steam Cloud!
  • At the beginning she's fully dressed. At highest striptease level she plays with various sex toys!
  • When she's really horny, she'll satisfy you!
  • In the end, you even get to sleep with her!

data.short_description: Defeat the woman of your dreams at Strip Blackjack and make her strip for you! What awaits you: Over 80 adult pictures and multiple erotic films! Plus, achievements and hours of fun!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 德文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 7
  • 處理器: 64bit Intel compatible Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 MB Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows 10
  • 處理器: 64bit Intel compatible Quad Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
